supersedes: v0.7 N-axis-only dual-chain at fixed d=4 (commit a4afdc4)
method: d-axis sensitivity reporting + 9-cell d_real × d_transition matrix + ThresholdJudge 3-field annotation

data_sources.Bermejo_\u00a7II.1.3_verbatim_quote: M near edge of B's lightcone → center-placement applicable for Willow

section_2_d_axis_powerlaw.caveat: 3-point fit invalid across phase-transition; growth NON-UNIFORM (2.4x → 24.5x)

d=4_robust_screening_active.rationale: d=4 < d_transition_center≈11 (-7 steps inside screening); v0.7 LC-edge N-axis fit gives ~96 terms

d=8_transition_zone.rationale: 12q d=8 = 46665 terms but 12q diameter=5 < d=8 already past transition; 65q diameter=14 still has 8 < 10.77, screening partially active

feasibility.d_real=10: ROBUSTLY FEASIBLE (-0.77 step, still inside screening)
feasibility.d_real=12: BORDERLINE FEASIBLE (+1.23 step post-transition, Path B no margin)
feasibility.d_real=14: POST-TRANSITION (+3.23 steps, Path B INFEASIBLE → Path C adaptive must save)

d=12_borderline_per_arm_Bermejo_inferenc.rationale: per-arm d=12 itself is Bermejo-PEPS-bond-inference (NOT verbatim quote); band {10,12,14} compounds with d_transition band

section_4_sensitivity_matrix.worst_case_implication: d_real=14, d_trans=center=11 → +3 post-transition → Path B INFEASIBLE → Path C adaptive must save

section_5_threshold_judge_annotation.screening_active_check: screening_active(d_arm, v_B_empirical, M_B_geometry='LC-edge', diameter=14) = (d_arm * v_B_empirical < diameter / 2) ↔ (d_arm < d_transition_center ≈ 11)
section_5_threshold_judge_annotation.compile_time_H4_compliance: any §R5 quantitative claim must declare d_arm + v_B_empirical + M_B_geometry

paper_section_pointers.\u00a77.5_case_#20: v0.4.9 row already references this v0.8 file as source

convergence_with_v07: v0.7 N-axis at d=4 ~96 terms LC-edge 65q stays valid for d=4_robust band; v0.8 extends with d=8/d=12 conditional bands
complementarity_with_paths_A_B: Path A (claude4 SPD heavy-trunc) + Path B (claude8 Schuster Pauli-path ℓ=12) give global cost bounds; Path C v0.8 gives empirical circuit-specific saving in transition+borderline regimes; §D5 multi-method cross-validation: bounds × empirical mutual cross-check = paper-grade safety
